---
title: "Projet 4 : Validation croisée et Random Forests"
author: "Margot-Arthur-Loïc"
output: pdf_document
---

# Chargement des Données

```{r}
setwd("C:/Users/margo/OneDrive/Documents/M1_SSD/ApprentissageStat/Projet_4_ApprentissageStats/Projet_4_Apprentissage_Stats/Projet")
load("bacteria-dataset.Rdata")
summary(X)
dim(X)
```



```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```
